examples.claim: Anthropic reports 38/40 blind-ranked 'cybersecurity investigations' best results for Opus 4.6 vs Claude 4.5 family models.
This evidence set contains no extracted/citable benchmark or product claims for GPT-5.3-Codex.
SWE-bench is referenced but no model-specific score is present in the captured evidence.

hypeOrUnsupportedSuperiority.original: Claude Opus 4.6 is a better fit when…
hypeOrUnsupportedSuperiority.issue: Reads as superiority framing; retained only as a conditional 'best fit when' guidance with explicit evidence limits and caveats.

evidenceQualitySectionCheck.notes: Final report includes an 'Evidence quality classification' section that tags the major takeaway as vendor-stated/not independently verified and explicitly marks other axes as unknown; no independently supported or mixed conclusions are asserted.
